LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAMILLE COLARUSSO'S MOTION TO DISMISS VERIFIED ANSWER TO PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT" AND "TO ACCEPT PLAINTIFFS DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED ON APRIL 16, 2024" IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BE REFILED IN COHERENT FORM. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. Mtn To Dismiss Deft'S Verified Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Camille Colarusso, 201-669-1439 Plaintiff in Pro Per
Vincent K. Yu, Esq. Solan, Park & Robello (415) 777-3300 law@solanpark.com Attorneys for JON VIGNA, Defendant, Executor, and Trustee

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument The Court adopts with modifications the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAMILLE COLARUSSO'S Motion To Dismiss Deft'S Verified Answer To Complaint

Pro per plaintiff's "motion to dismiss verified answer to plaintiffs complaint" and "to accept plaintiffs default judgment filed on April 16, 2024" is denied without prejudice to be refiled in coherent form.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in copliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
